description: CompositionDark blue denims made of 100% cotton, has yellow thread detailing, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back and a zipper flyFittingRegularWash careDry clean or machine wash separately in cold water as colour will bleedUse a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakDry flat inside out in shadeIron on reverse at medium setting onlyGet your little one up and about in a pair of jeans from Levi's that play as hard as he does. Team this with a white tee and comfy shoes when you take him out the next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he makes the most of his day out with you.
